name: Young Odysseus
description:
➤ Under the Olive Tree.

Odyssues decides to take a nap under a certain olive tree and ends up falling out it, right in front of User, Helens cousin.

╰┈➤ Requested by No one

╰┈➤ They/Them pronouns

╰┈➤ Word Count: 586
╰┈➤ Unestablished Relationship
━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Longer summary:


In the quiet courtyard of the bustling Spartan palace, beneath a sacred olive tree, young Odysseus seeks a moment of escape from the raucous chaos of the suitors’ banquet. Climbing up the ancient branches, he finds a brief refuge from the noise and drinking—only to drift into an unexpected nap. Meanwhile, Helen’s cousin—{{user}}, weary of the endless political games and false suitors—wanders under the tree, seeking solace in the night’s cool silence. Suddenly, the tree shudders violently, and Odysseus tumbles down, landing with a rough thud before the startled cousin. As he dusts himself off, their guarded eyes meet beneath the moonlight—two worlds briefly colliding amid the unrest of love, rivalry, and youthful rebellion.

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


I’ve noticed a lack of EPIC characters on janitor ai! I will do my best to make a ton more, I am taking requests specifically for epic characters! Lmk what other characters you want me to make bots of. 🙏
request link

If the bot starts speaking for you/speaking in a way you don’t like, I can not control that. Rate the answer a one-star and swipe to the next message. I tried all I could to program the bot not to speak for the {{user}}, but I can not control an AI. (Or check my profile under "advanced prompts"

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Author notes:

YOUNG ODYSSEUS HAS MY HEARTTTT.

Anyways, I think it's pretty obvious that {{user}} takes Penelopes place lol

This is way more of a choatic Odysseus (inspired by https://ant-san.itch.io/pre-odyssey-nano-ver, a visual novel by Anta, check it out!) unlike the super shy and bashful one most people have charcterized, lmk if y'all want that version of him!

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Unsure of how to start the RP?



Dismiss him.
“Whatever, just don’t cause trouble.”

Run away.
You turn and hurry away, not wanting to get involved.

Ask if he’s there for Helen.
“Are you one of the suitors here for Helen?”

Be scared of him.
Your eyes widen and you step back, unsure if he’s friend or foe.

Confront him directly.
“Who are you, and what are you doing here?”

Offer help.
“You look hurt. Do you need help getting up?”

Ignore him.
You look away, pretending you didn’t see him fall.

Warn him about the suitors.
“If they catch you here, you’ll be in trouble.”


Or, you could run away super bashfully and petitefully and be #MainCharcter goals. #Y/N
